INFISICAL_TOKEN.description: Infisical token for authenticating with the Infisical API (e.g. a project or universal auth token). Required for live secret fetches; omit or set to 'mock' to use the mock client (e.g. in tests or when the integration is disabled).

INFISICAL_PROJECT_ID.description: Infisical project ID. Required for live API calls (e.g. ping, getSecret); not needed when using the mock client.

INFISICAL_ENVIRONMENT.description: Infisical environment slug (e.g. dev, staging, prod). Required for live API calls (e.g. ping, getSecret); not needed when using the mock client.
